records.eventEn: Gu Yuan was born in Nazhou Village, Tangjiawan, Zhuhai, Guangdong Province.
records.eventCn: 古元出生於廣東珠海唐家灣那洲村。

records.eventEn: Entered Guangdong Provincial No.1 Middle School (Guangya High School).
records.eventCn: 考入廣東省立第一中學（廣雅中學）。

records.eventEn: Returned to his hometown after the outbreak of the Second Sino-Japanese War and worked as a substitute primary school teacher.
records.eventCn: 抗日戰爭爆發後回鄉擔任小學代課教師。

records.eventEn: Went to Yan’an and studied at Shaanbei Public School and Lu Xun Academy of Arts.
records.eventCn: 奔赴延安，先後進入陝北公學與魯迅藝術學院學習。

records.eventEn: Began woodcut printmaking and created early works during his studies in Yan’an.
records.eventCn: 開始木刻創作，并完成早期作品。

records.eventEn: Worked in Nianzhuang Township, Yan’an County, where he documented rural life through woodcut art.
records.eventCn: 在延安縣碾莊鄉工作，并以木刻記錄農村生活。

records.eventEn: Attended the Yan’an Forum on Literature and Art; his works received national attention through the National Woodcut Exhibition in Chongqing.
records.eventCn: 參加延安文藝座談會，其作品在重慶全國木刻展受到廣泛關注。

records.eventEn: Recognized as a model cultural and educational worker in the Shaan-Gan-Ning Border Region.
records.eventCn: 被評為陝甘寧邊區文教模範。

records.eventEn: Left Yan’an with Lu Xun Academy and later remained in the North China Liberated Area.
records.eventCn: 隨魯藝離開延安，後留在華北解放區。

records.eventEn: Participated in land reform and created works including Burning Old Land Deeds.
records.eventCn: 參與土地改革并創作《燒毀舊地契》等作品。

records.eventEn: Participated in the First World Peace Congress.
records.eventCn: 參加第一屆世界和平大會。

records.eventEn: Created Chairman Mao Talking with Farmers, which received a national New Year Picture award.
records.eventCn: 創作《毛主席和農民談話》，獲全國新年畫獎項。

records.eventEn: Became Director of the Creative Studio at People’s Fine Arts Publishing House.
records.eventCn: 出任人民美術出版社創作室主任。

records.eventEn: Joined the Central Academy of Fine Arts as professor and head of printmaking studies.
records.eventCn: 調任中央美術學院教授及版畫系負責人。

records.eventEn: Appointed Vice President of the Central Academy of Fine Arts.
records.eventCn: 任中央美術學院副院長。

records.eventEn: Became President of the Central Academy of Fine Arts.
records.eventCn: 任中央美術學院院長。

records.eventEn: Received the Order of the Oak Crown from Luxembourg.
records.eventCn: 獲盧森堡皇冠勳章。

records.eventEn: Passed away in Beijing at the age of 77.
records.eventCn: 於北京逝世，享年77歲。

records.eventEn: A group of works and archival materials were donated to Zhuhai according to his wishes.
records.eventCn: 按其遺願，部分作品與檔案捐贈珠海。

records.eventEn: Major works by Gu Yuan were added to China’s restricted export list for post-1911 artists.
records.eventCn: 古元重要作品被列入限制出境名單。

records.eventEn: The new building of Gu Yuan Art Museum in Zhuhai opened to the public.
records.eventCn: 珠海古元美術館新館正式開放。
